parameters.name: amount_max
parameters.description: Filter by transaction amount range. Use amount_min and amount_max to specify the range (e.g., amount_min=100&amount_max=500).

parameters.name: amount_min
parameters.description: Filter by transaction amount range. Use amount_min and amount_max to specify the range (e.g., amount_min=100&amount_max=500).

parameters.name: bulk
parameters.description: Filter by bulk payment ID. Returns transactions belonging to a specific bulk payment batch.

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Filter by transaction creation date. Use created_after and created_before with DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM:SS format (e.g., 20/11/2025 15:09:24) or ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-01 00:00:00).

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Filter by transaction creation date. Use created_after and created_before with DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM:SS format (e.g., 20/11/2025 15:09:24) or ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-01 00:00:00).

parameters.name: currency_code
parameters.description: Filter by currency code (e.g., KWD, USD, EUR). Returns transactions with the specified currency.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: The pagination cursor value.

parameters.name: customer_birth_date_after
parameters.description: Filter by customer birth date. Use customer_birth_date_after and customer_birth_date_before with DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM:SS format (e.g., 20/11/2025 15:09:24) or ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-01 00:00:00).

parameters.name: customer_birth_date_before
parameters.description: Filter by customer birth date. Use customer_birth_date_after and customer_birth_date_before with DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM:SS format (e.g., 20/11/2025 15:09:24) or ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-01 00:00:00).

parameters.name: disclosed_to_merchant
parameters.description: Filter by disclosure status to merchant. true = disclosed, false = not disclosed.

parameters.name: due_date_after
parameters.description: Filter by last transaction due date date. Use due_date_after and due_date_before with DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM:SS format (e.g., 20/11/2025 15:09:24) or ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-01 00:00:00).

parameters.name: due_date_before
parameters.description: Filter by last transaction due date date. Use due_date_after and due_date_before with DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM:SS format (e.g., 20/11/2025 15:09:24) or ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-01 00:00:00).

parameters.name: email_seen
parameters.description: Filter by whether the email notification was opened by the customer. true = email opened (email_seen_at is set), false = not opened.

parameters.name: email_seen_at_after
parameters.description: Filter by email seen date. Use email_seen_at_after and email_seen_at_before with DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM:SS format (e.g., 20/11/2025 15:09:24) or ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-01 00:00:00).

parameters.name: email_seen_at_before
parameters.description: Filter by email seen date. Use email_seen_at_after and email_seen_at_before with DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM:SS format (e.g., 20/11/2025 15:09:24) or ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-01 00:00:00).

parameters.name: gateway_code
parameters.description: Filter by payment gateway code. Returns transactions processed through the specified gateway.

parameters.name: initiator
parameters.description: Filter by initiator user ID. Returns transactions created by the specified user.

parameters.name: modified_after
parameters.description: Filter by last modification date. Use modified_after and modified_before with DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM:SS format (e.g., 20/11/2025 15:09:24) or ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-01 00:00:00).

parameters.name: modified_before
parameters.description: Filter by last modification date. Use modified_after and modified_before with DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM:SS format (e.g., 20/11/2025 15:09:24) or ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-01 00:00:00).

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: JSON-encoded search query for searching across configured search fields. Format: {"encrypted_field_key": "search_value"}. Get available search fields from OPTIONS response.

parameters.name: seen
parameters.description: Filter by whether the transaction has been viewed. true = viewed (seen_at is set), false = not viewed.

parameters.name: seen_at_after
parameters.description: Filter by seen at date. Use seen_at_after and seen_at_before with DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM:SS format (e.g., 20/11/2025 15:09:24) or ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-01 00:00:00).

parameters.name: seen_at_before
parameters.description: Filter by seen at date. Use seen_at_after and seen_at_before with DD/MM/YYYY HH:MM:SS format (e.g., 20/11/2025 15:09:24) or ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-01 00:00:00).

parameters.name: state
parameters.description:
The current state of the payment transaction, it helps to understand the progress of the payment.

* `refunded` - Refunded
* `refund_queued` - Refund Queued

parameters.name: state_changed_at_after
parameters.description: Filter by when the transaction state last changed. Use state_changed_at_after and state_changed_at_before with ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: state_changed_at_before
parameters.description: Filter by when the transaction state last changed. Use state_changed_at_after and state_changed_at_before with ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: unit
parameters.description: Filter by unit ID. Returns transactions belonging to the specified unit.
